name: golang-github-alecthomas-units-dev
title: golang-github-alecthomas-units-dev
summary: Go package for parsing byte units
description:
Go package for parsing byte units
This package provides multipliers and string conversion functions
for byte units with support for decimal and binary SI prefixes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-alecthomas-units-dev because Go package for parsing byte units.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-alecthomas-units-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-alecthomas-units-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
